hero.subtitle: A curated ecosystem of culture, craft, and place.

manifesto.title: Our philosophy
manifesto.body: We curate the modern African lifestyle — bridging the heritage of our land with the innovation of the future. Every detail is chosen with intention. Every experience is designed to last.

ecosystem.title: One venue, three experiences
ecosystem.subtitle: Three worlds, one vision. Each reinforces the others.
ecosystem.eventsDesc: Cultural events that move the scene forward

cta.title: Let's build the future together
cta.body: Groovethiopia is an invitation-centric ecosystem. We prioritize collaboration with individuals, brands, and investors who value the intersection of culture, luxury, and long-term development.

about.title: About Groovethiopia
about.subtitle: A premier Ethiopian conglomerate dedicated to excellence across hospitality, lifestyle, and strategic trade.

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.body: We curate the modern African lifestyle. We bridge the heritage of our land with the innovation of the future. At Groovethiopia, we view real estate as the canvas for human connection, events as the architecture of culture, and trade as the procurement of excellence. We are not generalists — we are specialists in high-concept living.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: To define the landscape of modern Ethiopian hospitality and culture by curating experiences, products, and destinations that exceed global standards of excellence.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: A future where Ethiopia is recognized globally as a nexus of culture, craft, and considered luxury — anchored by destinations, events, and assets that move the world forward.

story.title: Our story
story.body: Born in Addis Ababa from a conviction that Africa deserves world-class curation, Groovethiopia began with events that moved the local scene forward. From those first gatherings grew a portfolio spanning automotive heritage, hospitality development, and cultural production. Today, we operate as a diversified powerhouse — but our focus remains singular: curate what matters.

list.title: Curation
list.body: We choose deliberately. Less, but better.

list.title: Craft
list.body: Heritage meets precision. Every detail earns its place.

list.title: Cultural bridge
list.body: Rooted in Ethiopia, fluent in the world.

list.title: Long-term vision
list.body: We build for decades, not seasons.

events.title: The Pulse
events.subtitle: Events & Production
events.tagline: We do not host events; we engineer cultural milestones.

shukshuta.title: Shukshuta Speakeasy
shukshuta.body: Our signature intimate series — a subterranean curation of sound, atmosphere, and gathering. Each edition is a one-night world.

trading.title: The Collection
trading.subtitle: Luxury & Vintage Automotive
trading.body: Our import division is dedicated exclusively to the procurement of high-value automotive assets. We curate a specialized portfolio bridging elite modern luxury vehicles with meticulously refurbished vintage classics.

realEstate.title: The Sanctuary
realEstate.subtitle: Real Estate & Development
realEstate.vision: At Groovethiopia, we view real estate as the ultimate canvas for human connection. Our future developments are not merely buildings — they are immersive destinations that harmonize cutting-edge architecture with the raw beauty of the Ethiopian landscape.

philosophy.title: Design philosophy
philosophy.body: Sustainable-luxury ethos. Architectural innovation that honors the environment while providing guests with unparalleled experience.

investment.title: Investment thesis
investment.body: A growing middle class, rising tourism, and a global appetite for authentic African destinations create a once-in-a-generation window for visionary hospitality investment.

onDemand.title: On-demand commissions
onDemand.body: Have land? Have a vision? We build bespoke destinations to specification — from concept to operational handover.

contact.title: Let's build the future together
contact.subtitle: Groovethiopia Trading PLC is committed to cultivating long-term partnerships that drive innovation across the Ethiopian market.

paths.eventsDesc: Festival partnerships, activations, or Shukshuta bookings
